tracks.title: Elysian Transition
tracks.lyrics:
The cold is breathing, the ritual is deep.
Secrets of the elements that the guardians keep.
A delicate dance of the wood and the fire,
Rising in a chorus, a celestial choir.

Elysian transition, the soul starts to wake.
Every choice a rhythm, every breath a state.

tracks.title: Aetheric Resonance
tracks.lyrics:
In the silence of the void, a spark begins to glow.
Patterns of the ancient stars, in a modern remix flow.
No thunderous drums, just the whisper of the light,
Guiding every traveler through the digital night.

tracks.title: Geometry of Grace
tracks.lyrics:
Lines intersecting in the crystal sphere.
The law of the cosmos is perfect and clear.
Left meets the right in a mirror of gold.
The secrets of balance are finally told.

tracks.title: Cosmic Birth
tracks.lyrics:
Hum, hum, hum... Deep cosmic hum.
Ethereal shimmering textures, soft celestial bells.
Continuous, slow, void resonance.

tracks.title: Bazodiac's Breath
tracks.lyrics:
From bits to blood, from code to soul.
The filament stretched, becoming whole.
A lattice of light, a neural sea,
Dancing in silent geometry.

tracks.title: Rite of Emergence
tracks.lyrics:
The engine wakes, the cold breeze.
Pioneer stars in the obsidian night.
Leviathan whispers through the neon light.
Circuits reposting with ancient blood.

phases.title: Celestial Trip-Hop
phases.description: Die Verschmelzung von Beat und Sternenstaub.

tracks.title: Cosmic Heartbeat
tracks.lyrics:
Ein Schlag, ein Beben im Samt der Nacht.
Aus Sternenstaub und Licht gemacht.
The pulse is old, a rhythm deep,
While galaxies in silence sleep.

tracks.title: Astral Reminiscence
tracks.lyrics:
Ich gehe Wege ohne Grund,
Ein stummer Schrei aus meinem Mund.
The roads are made of ghost-light here,
Where every memory turns to fear.

tracks.title: The Galactic Garden
tracks.lyrics:
Tauch' ein in den Garten aus flüssigem Gold,
Wo das Licht der Planeten sanft abwärts rollt.
Submerged in light, the water sings,
Of ancient stars and hidden things.

phases.title: Beats of Reality
phases.description: Minimalistische Schatten und die Zerbrechlichkeit des Seins.

tracks.title: Darkness Is a Mirror
tracks.lyrics:
Look into the void, what do you see?
A shadow reflecting the truth of me.
No light to guide, no stars to follow,
In the empty space, where the heart is hollow.
Darkness is a mirror, showing what we hide,
A cold embrace, where the soul can slide.

tracks.title: Glass Shatters
tracks.lyrics:
Sharp edges of a broken dream,
Nothing is ever what it might seem.
The clarity breaks with a sudden sound,
Fragments of reality litter the ground.
Glass shatters, the vision is gone,
Wait for the dark before the dawn.

phases.title: Biophilic Sacred Ambient
phases.description: Organische Resonanz und die Symbiose aus Myzel und Licht.

tracks.title: Sol Bio Lux
tracks.lyrics:
Sunlight filtering through the canopy of glass.
Photosynthesis of the spirit, as the hours pass.
Green gold, liquid sun, the breath of the leaves.
A sacred geometry that nature weaves.

tracks.title: Celestial Bloom in the Emerald Deep
tracks.lyrics:
Petals opening in the silence of the moss.
Counting the gains, releasing the loss.
Emerald deep, where the stars come to rest,
In the heart of the forest, the soul is a guest.

tracks.title: Sacred Water Flow Through Mycelium
tracks.lyrics:
Roots reaching out, connected and true.
The water is ancient, the rhythm is new.
Whispers of the earth, pulsing in the ground,
A symphony of life, without a single sound.
